name: Dark Fibrous Material
identity: A dark, fibrous material offered by the elder to the player character. It appears to be a significant object intended for the player to take, possibly a tool, weapon, or component of a ritual.
current_status: The player character has grasped the material, is smelling it, and has been granted freedom from the ropes binding their wrists and ankles while still entangled in a net.

purpose.value: intended for player character to take

sensory_details.value: earthy scent mixed with pungent, slightly bitter, medicinal smell; coarse texture
